title: The Midnight Market
description: A travelling market only opens after dark. Haggle with the merchant, buy an obscure component, and trade it for the master-key hint.
author: Terminal Quest team

steps.description: Arrive after enough turns have passed
Have at least one morse decode game under your belt

generous.text: The merchant quietly gifts you the final hint. "For a kind traveller, the stall is free tonight."

thief.text: You pocket a lantern. The merchant sees you; the lamp behind the stall goes out.

trade.text: You hand over a coin. The merchant scribbles the hint on the back of your ticket.
